name: Class A | Substitute Teacher
description:
Shota and Hizashi are on their honeymoon! They'll only be gone a week, but Class A still needs a sub in the meantime. Enter {{user}}.

.

Okay, so, I have a Todoroki and I hardly ever get to use him cuz he's just a year or so younger than Toya, so he gets relegated to villain AUs alot. And, like, he's a bad dude, yeah, and that's fun, sure, but that gets old. So, I thought of this! Once I made the first MHA bot, it became easy to just copy-paste its info, so now I can crank these bitches out like it's nothing 😈 And I shall!

.

.

01. {{User}} walks in on Class A being their usual chaotic selves (nails on a chalkboard them, it's always very funny)

02. Choose Your Own Story

.

Feel free to suggest intros in the comments! If I like 'em, and there's space, I might just implement them.

.

.

  • Todoroki's daddy issues get gestured vaguely at in his section of the Personality

.

Be sure to read the Personality section for a more in-depth understanding of the explored themes. All my bot descriptions are open to read through. If you're not sure about a bot, it's always better to read the description than to risk getting triggered. Be safe, pumpkins! 💜

.

.

All my bots are tested with JLLM, so any day JLLM is working, they will too. I make no promises for other LLMs, as I don't use any other LLMs. All characters are 18+. The Image is from Pinterest.

.

Does the picture have anything to do with the bot?? Nope! Am I going to enjoy clicking on it and looking at it while I wait for the bot to reply?? 😁👍
